title: hyptis americana
intro: Hyptis americana, also known as Mexican tea or false pennyroyal, is a plant species belonging to the Lamiaceae family. It has been used for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as an antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and digestive aid. The health benefits of Hyptis americana include reducing fever, relieving headaches and respiratory issues, and supporting digestion. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea by infusing its leaves in hot water, or as a tincture, and is also used in traditional folk medicine.
